data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will continue to bring very hot weather to Guangdong today. With the anticyclone weakening and under the influence of a trough of low pressure, there will be showers and thunderstorms over southern China in the next couple of days. The anticyclone aloft is expected to cover Guangdong again early next week. Showers will ease off gradually and the weather will improve over the region. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to affect the central to northern part of the South China Sea in the middle and latter parts of next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Mekkhala will move across the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands today and tomorrow, then edge closer to the southern part of Honshu of Japan, and Tropical Cyclone Higos will move towards the seas south of Japan.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260625","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers and isolated thunderstorms. Showers will be heavier in some areas at first.
